description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Reusable governance kernel for autonomous work: wraps high-stakes agent or pipeline runs in phase gates, human review SLAs, ethics checks, reproducibility snapshots, tamper-evident audit logs, resource reports, and attestations.
ranked.first_task: Add a PhaseHandler/adapter interface, convert `_execute_phase_logic` from hardcoded demo behavior to registered handlers, and ship one Poiesis art-generation example that proves a real downstream run can emit audit entries, HRG decisions, state snapshots, and a final attestation through this engine.
